problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: CloudGlance AI Evaluator's Workbench: AI-Assisted Tender Evaluation for CRPF (L1 and QCBS)
summary: Design a platform to automate the evaluation of tender documents and bidder submissions for government procurement, using AI to ensure eligibility and produce explainable reports.
key_steps: auto-detect evaluation method and bidding mode
present to Tender Evaluation Committee for review
optimization_claims: reduces review time from 5-7 days to a single day
eliminates manual errors in evaluation process
increases transparency and accountability with audit log
constraints_addressed: different evaluators extract different values from the same scanned certificates
reconstructing specific evidence trail is manual and error-prone
